content.description: Removed capture-transcript and companion-path subcommands from bin/artifact.sh to satisfy the api-surface invariant (exactly 5 subcommands). Inlined the capture-transcript logic into .claude/hooks/on_stop.sh and .claude/hooks/on_pre_compact.sh. Replaced companion-path calls in bin/scribe-all.sh with direct filesystem path computation mirroring artifact.sh internal layout.
